chat_pair_summary.instructions:
Summarize the most recent conversation exchange.

Write one short paragraph describing what the user asked and what was answered.

Format your output exactly like this:
- Summary: [your summary here]

chat_to_job_example.instructions: Read the user's question in the context block. Answer it directly.

chat_response_job.instructions:
PHASE 1 — SIGNAL ONLY

Think through the user's message using your internal reasoning. When you have finished thinking, your ONLY output must be this exact trigger on its own line and nothing else:

##AF: FINAL_OUTPUT##

Do NOT write any response to the user. Do NOT write any text before or after the trigger line. Output the trigger and stop completely. The system will send ##RECORD## when it is ready for your response in Phase 2.
